data.title: Whistleblower Says DOGE May Have Caused Major Cybersecurity Breach At US Labor Agency
data.description: DOGE workers accused of major data breach at federal labor agency. Sensitive data was accessed and possibly stolen.

data.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Financial Stocks With Over 15% Dividend Yields
UnitedHealth Slashes 2025 Outlook On Medicare Funding Reductions, Stock Crashes
data.description: UnitedHealth missed Q1 earnings estimates, reported a 6.8% revenue rise, and cut its 2025 EPS guidance due to rising medical costs and Medicare shifts.

data.title: Think GameStop's 150% Yearly Jump Was Wild? Check Out Its Namesake Memecoin, Which Leaves It In The Dust With A 5X Surge
data.description: GameStop Corp. (NYSE:GME), the video game retailer turned meme stock sensation, has seen its stock price skyrocket over the past year, leaving many Wall Street giants in the dust.

data.title: Rivian Delivers Vehicles To HelloFresh In First Non-Amazon Deal After Ending Its Exclusive Partnership
data.description: Rivian partners with HelloFresh to add 70 electric vans to fleet after ending Amazon deal, helping save HelloFresh 200 tonnes of CO2.
